learnings.text: Task CLI (task.py) and Stage CLI (stage.py) are STUBS by design - they output [STUB] messages. This is intentional per code comments. Implementation pending D2.2. Do NOT report this as a bug.

Python import path fix for task-system: When importing db.py from a script, you must cd into /home/workspace/Skills/task-system/scripts first, then import using 'import db' directly (not 'from Skills.task_system.scripts import db'). The relative import path depends on working directory. --source D1.2
BUG: briefing.py 'staged' subcommand doesn't print output - generate_staged_review() works but CLI handler at ~line 687 needs 'print(output)' added
